title: Assessment Prior to the Issuance of a License (Post Qualification Assessment)
content:
Section 32. Scope of Assessment: The post-qualification assessment covers compliance with minimum office space, facilities, and equipment under Section 9 by the applicant whose license application has been approved. This assessment is conducted prior to issuance of the provisional license.

Section 33. Issuance of Authority to Assess: The Licensing Regulations Office (LRO) Director or authorized representative issues the Authority to Assess, indicating names of LLCO or POEA personnel, the applicant and registered address, purpose of assessment, and validity period.

Section 34. Conduct and Report of Assessment: LLCO/POEA personnel proceed to the establishment, present the authority to the applicant agency, and conduct the assessment in presence of a responsible representative who signs a copy of the authority. The assessment report is forwarded to the Licensing Branch of the Administration.
